name: skill-forge
description: Create runtime-neutral skill specs and compile them into Claude Code and Codex CLI skills.

interface.shortDescription: Create and compile cross-runtime skill specs
interface.longDescription: Skill Forge helps authors write runtime-neutral skill specs as a source of truth, then compile them into Claude Code and Codex CLI skill implementations with runtime capability differences called out explicitly.
defaultPrompt: Compile this skill spec for Claude and Codex
